title: Complaint
description: A complaint, grievance, or records request submitted to DOC — a second NET-NEW write surface. There is NO public API today: complaints and records/FOIL requests are filed by phone, mail, in person, or through the citywide OpenRecords portal, with no machine-readable status contract and no Open Data twin. This schema serves both the write surface (file a complaint / records request) and the read surface (check its status).

complaintId.description: Server-assigned tracking number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by DOC, not the requester.

description.description: Free-text description of the complaint or the records requested.

personInCustody.description: Optional reference to a person in custody the submission concerns.
